Query
  Pipeline
    Stage extend
      Assign bucket
        Call bin
          Ident timestamp
          Duration 30m
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
          Alias total
        Agg
          Call count
          WhereCond
            Binary ==
              Ident level
              String "ERROR"
          Alias errors
      By
        Ident bucket
    Stage extend
      Assign error_pct
        Call round
          Binary /
            Binary *
              Ident errors
              Float 100
            Ident total
          Int 1
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident bucket
